summary: EXP-204 closes both assigned issues via a targeted replacement of paragraph 4 of WIN-038.detail_evidence (the EXP-198 preemptive transverse-mode paragraph). Changes: (a) ISS-1310 — argument (i) now anchors to WIN-029’s 5.3% agreement between 9,572 km back-derivation and 9,086 km model parameterization, with explicit statement that the transverse-mode formula has no cavity-height output so the quantitative match evaporates entirely; (b) ISS-1309 — new sub-argument (iv) closes the cylindrical-waveguide Bessel-mode disc-cavity route with explicit cutoffs TM01 5.73 Hz, TM11 9.13 Hz, TE11 4.39 Hz for a=20,015 km, plus monotonicity closure against higher modes. The closing “no configuration” sentence is narrowed to explicitly enumerate all three mode families. Also folded in two c5-minor fixes: 40,030/40,075 km harmonization parenthetical (addresses holes_found[2]) and Schumann 1952 citation (addresses holes_found[3]). The factor-of-ten correction is already live in data/wins.json; TLDR clause is deliberately deferred. Analyst estimate: defense_survives drops from 2 to <=1.
